  \caption{Throughput of each access layer on the deep fetch as concurrency
    increases (postgres). The native driver leads at every concurrency level, with the query builder and Drizzle next and the data-mapper ORMs (Prisma among them) below; the ordering is stable above about 32 connections and compresses only at very low concurrency.}
  \label{fig:scaling}
